title: Familia y tiempo · People, body and calendar
focus: Essential A1 vocabulary for family, people, body parts, calendar words and simple descriptions.

words.example: Hablo con mi abuelo por la tarde.
words.example_en: I talk with my grandfather in the afternoon.

words.example_en: I talk with my grandmother in the afternoon.

words.example: Quiero correr mejor en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: I want to run better in real situations.

words.example: Aprendí a bailar durante el curso.
words.example_en: I learned to dance during the course.

words.example: Es importante cantar con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to sing calmly.

words.example: Intento pintar un poco cada día.
words.example_en: I try to paint a little every day.

words.example: Tenemos que tocar antes de decidir.
words.example_en: We have to touch; play an instrument before deciding.

words.example: Quiero esperar mejor en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: I want to wait; hope better in real situations.

words.example: Aprendí a limpiar durante el curso.
words.example_en: I learned to clean during the course.

words.example: Es importante ordenar con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to tidy; organise calmly.

words.example: Intento repetir un poco cada día.
words.example_en: I try to repeat a little every day.

words.example: Tenemos que pronunciar antes de decidir.
words.example_en: We have to pronounce before deciding.

words.example: Quiero deletrear mejor en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: I want to spell out better in real situations.

words.example: Aprendí a entender durante el curso.
words.example_en: I learned to understand during the course.

words.example: Es importante pasar con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to pass; happen calmly.

words.example: Intento nacer un poco cada día.
words.example_en: I try to be born a little every day.

words.example: Tenemos que crecer antes de decidir.
words.example_en: We have to grow before deciding.

words.example: Quiero sonreír mejor en situaciones reales.

words.example: Aprendí a llorar durante el curso.
words.example_en: I learned to cry during the course.

words.example: Es importante reír con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to laugh calmly.

words.example: Intento gritar un poco cada día.
words.example_en: I try to shout a little every day.

words.example: Me parece una opción gustoso.
words.example_en: It seems like a willing; pleased option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante guapo.
words.example_en: The situation is quite good-looking.

words.example: El ejemplo es alegre y fácil de recordar.
words.example_en: The example is cheerful and easy to remember.

words.example: Es un tema moreno para el examen.
words.example_en: It is a dark-haired; tanned topic for the exam.

words.example: Me parece una opción rubio.
words.example_en: It seems like a blond option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante largo.
words.example_en: The situation is quite long.

words.example: El ejemplo es corto y fácil de recordar.
words.example_en: The example is short and easy to remember.

words.example: Es un tema fuerte para el examen.
words.example_en: It is a strong topic for the exam.

words.example: Me parece una opción débil.
words.example_en: It seems like a weak option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante quieto.
words.example_en: The situation is quite still; quiet.

words.example: El ejemplo es solo y fácil de recordar.
words.example_en: The example is alone and easy to remember.

words.example: Es un tema casado para el examen.
words.example_en: It is a married topic for the exam.

words.example: Me parece una opción soltero.
words.example_en: It seems like a single; unmarried option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante divertido.
words.example_en: The situation is quite fun; funny.

words.example: El ejemplo es fresco y fácil de recordar.
words.example_en: The example is fresh; cool and easy to remember.

words.example: Responde ayer en la entrevista.
words.example_en: He or she answers yesterday in the interview.

words.example: Lo uso anteayer cuando hablo.
words.example_en: I use it the day before yesterday when I speak.

words.example: Mañana temprano tengo una cita en el centro.
words.example_en: Early tomorrow morning I have an appointment in the centre.

words.example: Esta semana estudio diez palabras nuevas cada día.
words.example_en: This week I study ten new words every day.

words.example: El próximo mes empiezo un curso nuevo.
words.example_en: Next month I start a new course.

words.example: Por favor repita la dirección más despacio.
words.example_en: Please repeat the address more slowly.

words.example: No pasa nada, podemos esperar unos minutos.
words.example_en: It is okay, we can wait a few minutes.

words.example: Mucho gusto, soy Daniel y estudio español.
words.example_en: Nice to meet you, I am Daniel and I study Spanish.
